OTPC - One-Time Programmable Memory Controller

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x1b40000
Size:
0x48
Source:
otpc_rf.rdl

Description

Source: fml13v03_u-boot/include/eswin/es_otp_map.h. Offsets 0x00-0x13 are undocumented; first known register is at 0x14. Trigger reads by writing rd_addr_size then the magic word 0x6ACCACC6 to cmd_word. Trigger writes by writing wr_data_mask then 0x9ACCACC9 to cmd_word. Trigger pgm-lock by writing 0x10C610C6 to cmd_word.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x13 - -
0x14 rd_addr_size OTP read base address, byte count, and XOR mode
0x18 rd_packet OTP read packet FIFO — read once per byte until rd_last asserts
0x1C op_status OTP operation status flags (sticky; clear with clear_status_int)
0x20 clear_status_int Clear op_status sticky flags — write 1 to each bit to clear
0x24 - -
0x30 glb_ctrl OTPC global control — enables, interrupt masks, DUT/JTAG access
0x34 cmd_word Command word
0x38 status OTP IP status flags
0x3C chip_ctrl Chip control — OTP values latched at power-on reset
0x40 np_pulse_num NP pulse count configuration for OTP programming
0x44 wr_data_mask OTP write data, bit-enable mask, and target address
